chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-43 of 2025 “Mst. Rani vs. SSP Sanghar and others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objections 2. For hearing of main case. 20-03-2025. Mr. Dilawar Hussain Panhwer advocate for applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G a/w SHO PS Khipro. = In compliance of directions of this Court, S.H.O P.S Khipro produced alleged detenue Mst. Ayesha. She states that due to inadvertent position the name of her step father namely Muhammad Ameen Laghari is mentioned in this application; however name of her real father is Muhammad Essa, who has been expired. She further states that she does not want to live with respondent No.3, who kept her in wrongful confinement and wants to go with applicant, who is her elder sister. Accordingly, she is allowed to live at her own choice. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application stands disposed of. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
